_comment: Catalog of snapshots the registry serves — the source of truth for snapshots.json. Order matters: the SDK resolves name:latest to the first matching name. url/sha256/size are computed at publish time by build-snapshots.yml (CI) or build-registry-bundle.sh (local).

snapshots.name: alpine
snapshots.description: Minimal Alpine Linux 3.23.0 root filesystem for RISC-V (riscv64), packed with kernel modules and the Capsulev vpod agent overlay. Serves as the base layer for all vsnap images. Memory limit: 256 MB.

snapshots.name: vsnap-base
snapshots.description: General-purpose vpod snapshot built on Alpine Linux 3.23.0 (riscv64). Includes ca-certificates, Python 3 and uv pre-installed and ready to run. Suitable for lightweight scripting and shell workloads. Memory limit: 256 MB.

snapshots.name: vsnap-base
snapshots.description: General-purpose vpod snapshot built on Alpine Linux 3.23.0 (riscv64). Same contents as vsnap-base with a 512 MB memory limit, for workloads that need more headroom (web servers, larger installs). Memory limit: 512 MB.

snapshots.name: vsnap-data
snapshots.description: vpod snapshot built on Alpine Linux 3.23.0 (riscv64). Extends vsnap-base with NumPy and pandas pre-installed for numerical and DataFrame workloads. Memory limit: 512 MB.
